title: AI bubble burst coming? Concerns jump after billionaire Peter Thiel's fund sells entire $100 million worth Nvidia stock
sentences: Concerns jump after billionaire Peter Thiel's fund sells entire $100 million worth Nvidia stock Billionaire Peter Thiel's hedge fund, Thiel Macro, sold its entire $100 million stake in Nvidia, contributing to concerns about a potential AI bubble burst.
This sell-off, along with SoftBank's earlier divestment of its Nvidia shares, has led investors to closely scrutinize Nvidia's upcoming quarterly results for insights into the demand for AI chips.
The moves by these major investors highlight growing anxiety about soaring tech stock valuations.
